mechanism_narrative: A declining federal funds rate trend, as the Fed shifts from tightening to an easing posture, lowers the discount rate on future equity cash flows and reduces borrowing costs, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days. This mechanism is continuously active regardless of trigger conditions.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 2.4% following July 2019 rate cut, first cut since 2008
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS trend and forward 20d SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive FEDFUNDS trends coincide with negative forward returns more than 50% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.2 percentage points over a 3-month window, it signals an inflection in labor market deterioration that historically precedes equity risk-off periods, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 3.7% near multi-decade lows as of Aug 2019
failure_condition: In triggered instances, forward 20d SPX returns are positive more than 55% of the time, or the effect size is not statistically distinguishable from unconditional baseline returns (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in both PAYEMS growth and INDPRO growth indicates a joint demand-and-production slowdown consistent with rising recession probability, and this combined signal produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days beyond what either series predicts alone.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 109.18 with slowing industrial momentum in mid-2019
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-INDPRO deceleration signal fails to outperform a single-series INDPRO-only model in out-of-sample Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During a late-cycle expansion phase, a decline in HOUST housing starts reflects reduced consumer confidence in durable, credit-sensitive spending and foreshadows broader demand weakness, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days, but this relationship is weak or absent in early/mid-cycle regimes.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1253k units, below prior expansion peaks as of mid-2019
failure_condition: HOUST declines in late-cycle regimes are not followed by negative 20d SPX returns more often than in early/mid-cycle regimes, or the regime-conditional effect disappears when tested against a matched non-late-cycle control sample.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in RSAFS retail sales reflects resilient consumer spending, the dominant driver of GDP, and this positive momentum feeds through to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price in continued earnings strength.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 523,514 million dollars, trending upward through mid-2019
failure_condition: Rank IC between RSAFS trend and forward 5d SPX returns is below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive RSAFS growth periods show no statistically significant return premium versus negative growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation rises while FEDFUNDS remains flat or declines, the resulting compression in the real policy rate lowers the effective cost of capital and supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days. The effect requires the joint movement of both series, not either alone.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 256.161 with FEDFUNDS at 2.4% post rate cut
failure_condition: The joint real-rate compression signal fails to produce higher forward 60d returns than a FEDFUNDS-only trend model in more than 3 consecutive out-of-sample years, or Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When 3-month annualized PAYEMS growth decelerates below a threshold consistent with late-cycle slowdown, it signals weakening labor income growth that erodes near-term consumption expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets react quickly to payroll surprises.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 151,431 thousand persons with decelerating monthly gains through 2019
failure_condition: Triggered instances show positive forward 5d SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or the mean return difference versus non-triggered periods is not statistically significant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained uptrend in INDPRO industrial production signals expanding real economic output and corporate earnings capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as fundamentals support higher equity valuations.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO trend and forward 60d SPX returns is below 0.03 over any rolling 3-year window, or INDPRO uptrends are followed by negative 60d returns more than 45% of the time.
